name: Harnesson
summary: A Visual AI Coding Management Platform centered on harness engineering. Provides AI agent lifecycle management, real-time chat interface, spec synchronization with graph visualization, and project/branch management in a monorepo architecture (Hono server + React web + shared types).
goals: Enable visual management of AI coding agents across multiple projects
Provide real-time chat interface with rich content rendering and interactive tools
Synchronize project specifications as structured, visualizable spec trees
Manage projects and git branches through a unified web interface

design.overview: pnpm monorepo with three packages: @harnesson/server (Hono API + SQLite/Prisma), @harnesson/web (React + Zustand + ReactFlow), @harnesson/shared (TypeScript types). Server exposes REST + SSE endpoints; frontend consumes via fetch and EventSource.
design.flow: User action → React component → Zustand store → serverApi → Hono route → Service/Adapter → Database/File system → SSE push → Store update → UI re-render

acceptanceCriteria.when: a user opens the web UI
acceptanceCriteria.then: they see the project list or new session page with navigation sidebar

end-to-end.given: Server and web app are running
end-to-end.when: user navigates to the application URL
end-to-end.then: the main page loads with navigation and project management

syncMeta.baseCommitMessage: feat(sync-specs): add auto-detection status rules in Step 5 user review
